channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
One thing I wonder is how you do accounting for this?
I guess not so different, cause you still jus...
item.description:
One thing I wonder is how you do accounting for this?
I guess not so different, cause you still just account your expenses and your income, but the main balance just becomes Stripe?
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 6 | 🔁 0 | 💬 7 | 👁 2152
item.author: @levelsio

item.title: ComfyUI is the most flexible, composable, and powerful open-source media generation tool with a mass...
item.description:
ComfyUI is the most flexible, composable, and powerful open-source media generation tool with a massive ecosystem of workflows and custom nodes.
Your Hermes Agent can now install, launch, manage, and run sophisticated @ComfyUI workflows on demand. https://t.co/IXYdAe1Mnf
--- @NousResearch | ❤️ 113 | 🔁 10 | 💬 17 | 👁 2423
item.author: @NousResearch

item.title:
It turns out, the job of a radiologist isn't to read x-rays.
It's to cure people.
And if AI can ...
item.description:
It turns out, the job of a radiologist isn't to read x-rays.
It's to cure people.
And if AI can help speed the process of understanding x-rays, radiologists can see and cure more people.
--- @kevinweil | ❤️ 24 | 🔁 2 | 💬 1 | 👁 1237
item.author: @kevinweil

item.title:
Still wondering how you can use Codex for (almost) everything?
Codex can help with more of the work...
item.description:
Still wondering how you can use Codex for (almost) everything?
Codex can help with more of the work that supports the work, from organizing research to making spreadsheets, decks, and summaries. https://t.co/aoTXXbkinw

item.title: Learn more: https://t.co/2H3UxR8lcz
item.author: @nvidia

item.title: 📈 NVIDIA tops AI leaderboards and benchmarks with open models driven by extreme co-design across com...
item.description:
📈 NVIDIA tops AI leaderboards and benchmarks with open models driven by extreme co-design across compute, networking, memory, storage, and software.
This includes models for biology, AI physics, agentic AI, physical AI, robotics, and autonomous vehicles.
By being vertically integrated and horizontally open, NVIDIA enables its ecosystem to scale agentic workflows at every layer of the stack with the lowest cost per token.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 62 | 🔁 5 | 💬 9 | 👁 6258
item.author: @nvidia

item.author: @AnthropicAI

item.title:
Watching the news today feels a lot like watching a movie I’ve seen many times before.
In 1971, I w...
item.description:
Watching the news today feels a lot like watching a movie I’ve seen many times before.
In 1971, I witnessed a major currency devaluation that I thought would be a disaster—but the markets actually went up. It was a lesson I only learned by looking back at 1933. When you study the historical "scripts," the current plot becomes much clearer.
--- @RayDalio | ❤️ 160 | 🔁 24 | 💬 24 | 👁 30252
item.author: @RayDalio
